title: senecio biserratus
intro: Senecio biserratus, also known as the serrated ragwort, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to Australia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and act as a natural antiseptic. The health benefits associated with Senecio biserratus include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to treat various ailments.
